# Ethosoft

> Ethosoft is an interdisciplinary artificial intelligence research team working across language models, healthcare, education, and core AI.

## Research papers

- [Foresight Is Not Enough](https://ethosoft.org/papers/foresight-is-not-enough/): A 2026 preprint examining sentence-level future prediction, self-loop hard negatives, semantic reranking, and the representation-to-behavior calibration gap in small language models. DOI: 10.21203/rs.3.rs-10331341/v1.

## Research index

- [Ethosoft Papers](https://ethosoft.org/papers/): The canonical index of Ethosoft preprints and technical reports.
- [Ethosoft Projects](https://ethosoft.org/#projects): Current artificial intelligence research and product areas.
- [Ethosoft Team](https://ethosoft.org/#team): Team members and research contributors.

## External research profiles

- [Ethosoft on GitHub](https://github.com/ethosoftai)
- [Ethosoft on Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/Ethosoft)
